_publications._publicationTitle: Chromosome 8 gain is associated with high-grade transformation in MPNST

_contextSnippet: WU-225 PDX established from primary thigh NF1-MPNST; characterized for chromosome 8q gain (100%); one of 8 NF1-MPNST PDX lines
details: WU-225 PDX established from primary thigh NF1-MPNST; characterized for chromosome 8q gain by SNP array (100%); one of 8 NF1-MPNST PDX lines used to study chromosome 8 gain in high-grade MPNST transformation
